site.name: HonestPick
site.description: Honest, in-depth product reviews based on real-world testing. No paid placements — just straightforward picks to help you buy smarter.

hero.heading: Reviews you can
hero.subheading: We buy, test, and write — no affiliate pressure, no fake reviews. Just honest picks for smarter shopping.

tech.name: Tech & Gadgets
tech.description: Headphones, cables, chargers — tested for real-world use

beauty.name: K-Beauty
beauty.description: Skincare that actually works, not just hype

steps.title: We Buy It
steps.description: Every product is purchased at full retail price — no gifted samples, no brand relationships.

steps.title: We Test It
steps.description: Minimum 2 weeks of real-world use before writing a single word of review.

steps.title: We Write Honestly
steps.description: Pros, cons, and verdict — including the parts brands wouldn't want you to know.

newsletter.title: Get Honest Picks in Your Inbox
newsletter.subtitle: New reviews every week. No spam. Unsubscribe anytime.

footer.tagline: Honest reviews. Real testing. No fluff.
